author: draganrakita
content: Sharing [EIP](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11355/files?short_path=4f86b87#diff-4f86b87b99ae9cdec959a30ae39e7bfbefcd2ffa1277449c867586cafc5b9255) for new transaction type (Amsterdam Tx) that imo is elegant solution that adds cryptography to tx and allow signature type to be added (and additional new cryptograhy if future). And this can be extended with new capabilities. Additionally example of [Tempo tx](https://docs.tempo.xyz/protocol/transactions/spec-tempo-transaction) and [EIP-8164](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11330) are good read.

author: txtiger
content: If anyone is interested in PQ migrations, this may be worth your time: https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/post-quantum-migrations-crypto-agility-and-how-to-prevent-eip-7932-from-failing/27836
